Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS
REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS
AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Relates to the retirement contributions of career public employees
Summary: Provides for new retirement contribution rates of certain public employees.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the retirement and social security law and the education law, in relation to the retirement contributions of career public employees
